However this is making me unmotivated to just do random stuff, make stuff up and do them - which leads to me doing nothing all day and ends in me being in a very depressed state, extremely tired of my life and needing a drastic change - which I can’t make happen.

Any advice would be appreciated
Thanks 🙏
